---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
---

My teaching experience focuses on applied mathematics, numerical methods, computational mechanics, and engineering mathematics at undergraduate and master levels. I have taught in Spanish, English, and Italian, combining theoretical lectures, problem-solving sessions, numerical laboratories, and project-based mentoring.

**At a glance**

- **Teaching areas**: Applied mathematics, numerical methods, computational mechanics
- **Levels**: Undergraduate and master
- **Languages**: Spanish, English, Italian
- **Formats**: Theory lectures, exercise sessions, numerical laboratories, project mentoring

### 🧑‍🏫 Undergraduate Courses

#### Fundamentos Matemáticos en Ingeniería I
- **Degree**: Grado en Ingeniería Aeroespacial  
- **Institution**: Department of Applied Mathematics, University of Alicante, Spain  
- **Language**: Spanish  
- **Type**: Lecture (Theory and exercises)  
- **Years**:  
  - 2024/2025 (120h) – [Guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wcodest=C214&wcodasi=33803&wlengua=C&scaca=2024-25)  
  - 2025/2026 (120h)
  - 2026/2027 (scheduled)

#### Matemáticas Básicas
- **Degree**: Grado en Ingeniería en Sonido e Imagen en Telecomunicación  
- **Institution**: Department of Applied Mathematics, University of Alicante, Spain  
- **Language**: Spanish  
- **Type**: Lecture (Exercises)
- **Year**: 
   - 2024/2025 (30h) – [Guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=en&wcodasi=20004&scaca=2024-25#)
   - 2025/2026 (60h)
   - 2025/2026 (scheduled)

#### Fundamentos de Matemática Aplicada 2
- **Degree**: Grado en Ingeniería Robótica  
- **Institution**: Department of Applied Mathematics, University of Alicante, Spain  
- **Language**: Spanish  
- **Type**: Lecture (Exercises)  
- **Years**:  
  - 2024/2025 (16h) – [Guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=es&wcodasi=33706&scaca=2024-25)  


#### Fundamentos Matemáticos 2
- **Degree**: Grado en Fundamentos de la Arquitectura  
- **Institution**: Department of Applied Mathematics, University of Alicante, Spain  
- **Language**: Spanish  
- **Type**: Lecture (Exercises)  
- **Year**: 2024/2025 (12h) – [Guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=es&wcodasi=35509&scaca=2024-25)

#### Calcolo Numerico
- **Degree**: Ingegneria Chimica e dei materiali  
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Matematica, University of Padua, Italy  
- **Language**: Italian  
- **Type**: Laboratorio numerico  
- **Year**: 2022/2023 (24h)  
- **Description**: Practical exercises of numerical calculus using the software MATLAB.

### 🎓 Master Courses

#### Cálculo Diferencial Avanzado
- **Degree**: Master in Civil Engineering  
- **Institution**: Escuela Politécnica Superior, Universidad de Alicante, Spain 
- **Language**: Spanish  
- **Type**: Lecture (theory and exercises)  
- **Year**: 2026/2027 (45h) - Scheduled 
- **Description**: Theory and exercises on advanced differential calculus, including multivariable calculus, differential equations, and applications in engineering.

#### Particle Mechanics
- **Degree**: Master in Civil Engineering  
- **Institution**: Institut für Dinamik und Statik, University of Braunschweig, Germany  
- **Language**: English  
- **Type**: Lecture (theory and exercises)  
- **Year**: 2023/2024 (10h)  
- **Description**: Preparation of materials and execution of practical exercises using the software KRATOS Multiphysics.

#### Numerical Methods for Continuous Systems
- **Degree**: Master in Mathematical Engineering  
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Ingegneria Civile, Edile e Ambientale, University of Padua, Italy  
- **Language**: English  
- **Type**: Mentoring  
- **Year**: 2022/2023 (12h)  
- **Description**: Support in projects, practical exercises and elaboration of educative material.

### 👩‍🎓 Supervision and mentoring

#### Master theses co-supervised

##### Giovanni Campanella — completed, July 2025

- **Title**: *A mixed Material Point Method for the Stokes equations: a stabilized velocity-pressure formulation*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Main supervisor**: Antonia Larese
- **Degree**: Master in Mathematical Engineering
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Matematica, Università degli Studi di Padova, Italy
- **Academic year**: 2024/2025
- **Date of defense**: July 2025

##### Alessandro Contri — completed, December 2021

- **Title**: *An Updated Lagrangian displacement-based formulation for free surface incompressible fluids using MPM*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Main supervisor**: Antonia Larese
- **Degree**: Master in Mathematical Engineering
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Matematica, Università degli Studi di Padova, Italy
- **Academic year**: 2020/2021
- **Date of defense**: December 2021

#### Bachelor theses supervised

##### Lucas Peydró Ferrando — ongoing, 2025/2026

- **Title**: *Simulación Numérica de las olas generadas por deslizamientos mediante el método del punto material: aplicación al caso de Lituya Bay.*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Degree**: Grado en Física
- **Institution**: University of Alicante, Spain
- **Academic year**: 2025/2026
- **Status**: July 2026 (expected)


###  📚  Teaching-related publications

This section includes publications and outputs related to teaching innovation, educational practice, and university-level learning activities.
